transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-06-27]
[00:00] You: Let's review the new dashboard designs from the design team.
[00:45] Speaker 1: I think the color contrast on the sidebar is too low. We need to fix that before shipping.
[01:20] Speaker 2: I'll update the sidebar contrast ratios to meet WCAG AA standards. I can get that done today.
[02:00] You: Good. What about the mobile breakpoint issue?
[02:30] Speaker 1: I'll fix the responsive layout for screens under 375px. That's a two-day task, so I'll have it done by June 29th.
[03:00] Speaker 2: The typography scale also needs updating. I'll revise the heading sizes in the design system by end of next week — July 4th.
[03:45] You: We've agreed the new dashboard goes into code review on July 7th. Let's stick to that.
[04:00] Speaker 1: Confirmed. I'll coordinate the review session.

action_items.description: Update sidebar contrast ratios to meet WCAG AA standards
action_items.source_quote: I'll update the sidebar contrast ratios to meet WCAG AA standards. I can get that done today.

action_items.description: Fix responsive layout for screens under 375px
action_items.source_quote: I'll fix the responsive layout for screens under 375px. That's a two-day task, so I'll have it done by June 29th.

action_items.description: Revise heading sizes in the design system
action_items.source_quote: I'll revise the heading sizes in the design system by end of next week — July 4th.

action_items.description: Coordinate code review session for new dashboard
action_items.source_quote: Confirmed. I'll coordinate the review session.

decisions: New dashboard goes into code review on July 7th
